description: 20 initial lesson topics for Curso de Espanol (Domi + Gringa)

lessons.title: Que lo que! - How Dominicans Say What's Up
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican greetings vs formal Spanish greetings

lessons.title: Vaina - The Most Dominican Word Ever
lessons.culturalContext: How 'vaina' replaces almost any noun in Dominican Spanish

lessons.title: Ordering Street Food Like a Local
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican street food culture and how to order

lessons.title: Diache! - Dominican Surprise Expressions
lessons.culturalContext: How Dominicans express surprise vs other Spanish speakers

lessons.title: What's a Tiguere? Dominican Street Smarts
lessons.culturalContext: The concept of 'tiguere' in Dominican culture - street smart persona

lessons.title: Why Dominicans 'Eat' Their Letters
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican phonetics - dropped S, D between vowels, contractions

lessons.title: Dominican Pickup Lines That Actually Work (or Not)
lessons.culturalContext: Flirting culture in the Dominican Republic vs USA

lessons.title: Dembow, Bachata, Merengue - Music Spanish
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican music genres and the vocabulary around them

lessons.title: The Colmado - Dominican Corner Store Life
lessons.culturalContext: The colmado as social hub in Dominican neighborhoods

lessons.title: When Insults Are Actually Terms of Endearment
lessons.culturalContext: How tone changes meaning - insults used lovingly in Dominican culture

lessons.title: Guagua, Motoconcho, Carro Publico - Getting Around
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican transportation system and how to navigate it

lessons.title: Words That Don't Mean What You Think
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican words that mean something completely different than expected

lessons.title: Money Talk - Dominican Style
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican money slang and expressions about being broke or rich

lessons.title: Dominican Family - Everyone is Your Tia
lessons.culturalContext: How Dominicans use family terms for non-family members

lessons.title: No Hay Luz! - Surviving Power Outages Dominican Style
lessons.culturalContext: Power outage culture in DR and how people cope with humor

lessons.title: Pelota! - Baseball is Religion in DR
lessons.culturalContext: Baseball as Dominican national passion and its vocabulary

lessons.title: Ahora, Ahorita, Ahoritita - Dominican Time
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican concept of time - none of these mean 'right now'

lessons.title: La Parranda - Dominican Party Culture
lessons.culturalContext: Dominican party culture, pre-gaming, and celebration vocabulary

lessons.title: Gringa vs Dominicana - Cultural Showdown
lessons.culturalContext: Humorous cultural differences between DR and USA

lessons.title: Bye is Never Quick - Dominican Goodbyes
lessons.culturalContext: Why Dominican goodbyes take 30 minutes - la bendicion tradition
